issues.description: Target should include Leader cards: scope should be 'ChooseOwnLeaderOrCharacter', not just 'ChooseOwnCharacter'
Second effect trigger is 'Trigger' (undefined). Should be 'OnPlay' as both effects are part of the same Main card activation
Action type is 'ReturnToHand' but effect says 'place at the bottom of the owner's deck' - should use a different action or custom handling. ReturnToHand puts cards in hand, not deck bottom
Target is 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' but effect should target 'own Character' (your Character with cost 2 or less). Should be 'ChooseOwnCharacter'
maxCost is 3 but effect specifies 'cost of 2 or less', so maxCost should be 2
